occupation: Global Sales Director at The Neuron
headline: Global Sales Director
summary:
Hello and thank you for taking the time to read my profile, After over 20 years working across the Radio & OOH Landscape, I have decided to move into the Media Technology world working at The Neuron on programmatic digital out of home advertising.

A dedicated platform designed to be easy to plan, buy and execute your own campaigns with just a few clicks…

Access to the best inventory globally, the audience you want to reach, price you want to pay & the duration that suits your budget & campaign needs.

For more information & a demo to the platform, please call me 07775 010401

experiences.title: Global Sales Director
experiences.description: Complete responsibility for the Global Operations by managing partnership's with our partners and publishers. Working with Agencies & SMB's to plan, buy and manage their Digital Out of Home (DOOH) through our DSP platform.. The Neuron's easy-to-use platform makes it simple to plan, buy and manage your DOOH activities and access premium inventory. All in one platform. Precision targeting to connect with your audience where they are Our precision data targeting helps you connect with your audience as they go about their lives by delivering relevant messages in the moment to build engagement and create a hypercontextual experience.

experiences.title: Sales Director
experiences.description: ► Providing leadership, support & direction for the Commercial department based at HQ ► Setting clear objectives and monthly / quarterly revenue targets ► Responsible for team recruitment ► Responsible for overall revenue driven from HQ across the Bauer mmedia portfolio ► Managing commercial demands alongside inventory management ► Drive, generate & Implement non traditional revenue across our platforms ► Hands on training, coaching and development of the team

experiences.title: Regional Sales Director
experiences.description: ► Increase YOY revenue by 20% ► Launched The Free Radio Regional Brand from 3 previous ► Intergrated sales teams

experiences.title: Agency Sales Director
experiences.description: ► Highest biller  2011 ► Billed over £3.2 million - 22% new business 2011 ► Induction Training & Development with New starter's ► Built A new dedicated agency team ► Working with National Agencies to deliver Multi-platform campaigns across the Network

experiences.title: Agency Sales Manger
experiences.description: ► UK Sales Manager of the year - 2009 ► Increased Agency revenue by 49% - over 1.3 Million - 2008 ► Managed team of 4 to deliver over 2.4 Million - 2009

experiences.title: Professional Footballer

recommendations:
Jane Cole

Ross is a first class commercial operator who has worked his way up from a business /account Manager to managing teams - his skills include developing sales people, leading by example, being able to prospect and develop new business and has excellent rapport b building skills with clients at all levels.  Radio was an area Ross excelled at, and this is the area we worked in together, his understanding of the digital arena is also first rate.

Daniel Wheeldon

Ross is a great leader and tutor with a flexible coaching style which drives positive behaviours within a team. Always willing to get involved and is fantastic in front of clients, with a confident and customer focussed approach. Ross' experience is second to none, and this shows during client orientation, creatively thinking of new ways to interact with customers both new and existing whilst maximising revenue. A pleasure to work for!
